infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: PhoneFinder uses your location so you can find this device again if it is lost or stolen.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: PhoneFinder uses your location in the background so you can find this device even when the app is closed.
